did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article that compares and discusses existing literature on skin cancer diagnosis using both manual (handcrafted) and automated (deep learning) features. It does not present original experimental results obtained by applying AI/ML methods itself, but rather summarizes and evaluates previous studies.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
